quick_tactical_summary: Interior run and RPO remain the preferred answers when down and distance allow.
Q. Gillians edge pressure makes quick game, screens, movement passes, chips, and boots important.
Deep shots should be protected and situational, not repeated into pressure.

notes: Use live history, recent-call memory, and verified matchup traits to rotate concepts.
